race.description: Guardian Safety Solutions Gosford Gold Cup (L)
race.comment: PORTLAND (12) has caught the eye at all four runs this time in. Expect to see him settle a little closer today from the low draw after travelling wide with a respectable eighth over 2000m in the G3 JRA Plate at Randwick. McEvoy sticks and looks hard to stop here. ZAPHOD (16) underrated gelding who will relish the sharp weight drop third-up. Was a month between runs when he shouldered the 59.5kg for a game seventh over 1800m at Randwick. Trip suits and Gibbons can put him in the right position early. Genuine contender. SUNSET PARK (15) out to her right trip last start when she gripped on to finish seventh in the G3 JRA Plate over 2000m at Randwick. Will take control early and prove hard to run down. YOU WAHNG (11) deep into the campaign and indicated a win was imminent when second in the JRA Plate. Well drawn again. BOIS D'ARGENT (2) gets map favours from the draw and don't underestimate.
